---
title: "HW6 Q1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
 
```{r}
 library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)


load('C:/Users/hybaa/Desktop/HW6/house_prices.rda')

ls()
names(house_prices)
head(house_prices)
str(house_prices)
#A

house_prices <- house_prices %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(format(date, "%Y")))

# Define x-axis ticks
x_breaks <- c(1980, 2000, 2020)
x_labels <- c("'80", "'00", "'20")

plot_a <- ggplot(house_prices, aes(x = year, y = house_price_index)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ state) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  labs(
    title = "House Price Index Over Time by State",
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "House Price Index"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    strip.text    = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 5),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

print(plot_a)


#B


house_reshaped <- house_prices %>%
  gather(key   = "measure",
         value = "value",
         -date,               
         -state,             
         -year,              
         -house_price_perc)   

head(house_reshaped)


#C

plot_c <- ggplot(house_reshaped,
                 aes(x = year, y = value,
                     color = measure, group = measure)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.45) +
  facet_wrap(~ state) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks, labels = x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("house_price_index" = "steelblue",
               "unemploy_perc"    = "tomato"),
    labels = c("house_price_index" = "House Price Index",
               "unemploy_perc"    = "Unemployment %")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "House Price Index & Unemployment % by State",
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Value",
    color = "Measure"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 5),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.spacing   = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

print(plot_c)
```
